name: And I Walked…
overview: A lady named Mayda comes back to Lebanon from Canada with her daughter Tali 16 years after she left. The story will unfold, old pains will resurge, revealing how intertwined all the characters and their storylines are.

trailers.title: "W Mchit" Official Music Video - Jad Katrib - جاد قطريب -  تيتر مسلسل ومشيت
